zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Westbrome於大約1526年出生在英國艾可時，他的父親Robert Westbrome27歲，母親Mrs. Robert Westbrome25歲。他於1548年7月3日與Elizabeth Bell在英國艾可格亞特 可拉可頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1594年12月2日之前在英國艾可可爾斯特，埋葬在英國艾可分格林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Westbrome于大约1526年出生在英国艾可时，他的父亲Robert Westbrome27岁，母亲Mrs. Robert Westbrome25岁。他于1548年7月3日与Elizabeth Bell在英国艾可格亞特 可拉可頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1594年12月2日之前在英国艾可可爾斯特，埋葬在英国艾可分格林。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Westbrome was born about 1526, in Essex, England, his father, Robert Westbrome, was 27 and his mother, Mrs. Robert Westbrome, was 25. He married Elizabeth Bell on 3 July 1548, in Great Clacton, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 2 December 1594, in Colchester, Essex, England, and was buried in Fingringhoe, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Westbrome est né environ 1526, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Robert Westbrome, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Robert Westbrome, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Bell le 3 juillet 1548, à Great Clacton, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 2 décembre 1594, à Colchester, Essex, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Fingringhoe, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Westbrome um 1526 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Westbrome 27 und seine Mutter Mrs. Robert Westbrome 25. Er hat am 3. Juli 1548 in Great Clacton, Essex, England Elizabeth Bell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 2. Dezember 1594 in Colchester, Essex, England und wurde in Fingringhoe, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Westbrome è nato il circa 1526 nel Essex, England, il suo padre, Robert Westbrome, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Robert Westbrome, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Bell il 3 luglio 1548, nel Great Clacton, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 2 dicembre 1594, nel Colchester, Essex, England, e fu sepolto a Fingringhoe, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Westbromeが約1526年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Robert Westbromeは27歳，母Mrs. Robert Westbromeは25歳であった。1548年7月3日にイギリスエセックスグレアト クラクトンでElizabeth Bellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1594年12月2日以前にイギリスエセックスコルチェスターで死去し，イギリスエセックスフィングリングhオにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Westbrome(이)가 대략 1526년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Westbrome(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Robert Westbrome(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1548년 7월 3일 영국 에세스 그리트 클라크턴에서 Elizabeth Bell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1594년 12월 2일 이전 영국 에세스 코체스터에서 사망했으며 영국 에세스 핑그링호에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Westbrome nasceu aproximadamente 1526, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Westbrome, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Robert Westbrome, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Bell em 3 de julho de 1548, em Great Clacton, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 2 de dezembro de 1594, em Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Fingringhoe, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Westbrome родился около 1526 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Westbrome было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Robert Westbrome, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Bell 3 июля 1548 г. в местности грит клактон, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 2 декабрь 1594 г. в местности колчестир, эссекс, Англия и был похоронен в местности фингрингхо, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Westbrome nació aproximadamente 1526, en Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Westbrome, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mrs. Robert Westbrome, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Bell el 3 de julio de 1548, en Great Clacton, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 2 de diciembre de 1594, en Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Fingringhoe, Essex, Inglaterra.
